title: Outbox and followers collection return application/json, not application/activity+json
description: The /users/{username}/outbox and /users/{username}/followers endpoints return Json(doc).into_response(), which axum sets to Content-Type: application/json. The ActivityPub spec (and Mastodon's implementation) requires Content-Type: application/activity+json (or application/ld+json with profile) for all AP documents including OrderedCollection and OrderedCollectionPage responses. Strict AP clients will reject these responses or fail to dereference them. The actor endpoint correctly sets application/activity+json (server.rs line 244); outbox and followers need the same treatment. Fix: wrap with explicit content-type header, same pattern as the actor handler.
close_reason: All pass 2 fixes applied: circuit breaker reset, persona-scoped 410, SSRF private IP block, tokio::fs, URL scheme validation, Content-Type, page clamp, watch dedup
